title: Selling Presets Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigeria-based digital creator with a passion for selling presets, but every time you try to use Stripe or PayPal, you hit a roadblock. These popular payment processors either ban you due to your country's restrictions or freeze your account for unknown reasons. You're left with no option but to abandon your creative business or find a new way to get paid. You're not alone. Many creators in restricted countries face this same struggle. The question is, what can you do to sell presets and get paid without relying on Stripe or PayPal?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip are two popular alternatives to Stripe and PayPal, but they come with their own set of limitations. Gumroad charges a 3.5% commission on sales, while Payhip charges 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. Both platforms also require you to create a buyer account, which may not be feasible for international customers. On the other hand, Web3 Wallet Connect offers a seamless payment experience without any commission fees or account requirements. You can connect your wallet to the platform and start selling presets instantly. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can focus on creating more content and growing your business without worrying about payment hassles.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad and Payhip have strict policies against transactions from restricted countries, which may result in your account being frozen or terminated. PayPal also freezes accounts from Nigeria and other countries due to 'security concerns.' Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, supports a wide range of cryptocurrencies and has no restrictions on countries. This means you can sell presets to customers from anywhere in the world without worrying about your account being blocked.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for international transactions, which can eat into your profit margins. Gumroad and Payhip also charge commission fees, which can add up quickly. Web3 Wallet Connect, however, allows you to set your own prices and keep 100% of your earnings. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can focus on creating high-quality presets without worrying about payment fees.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad and Payhip require manual delivery of presets, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, offers automated delivery of presets, which means you can focus on creating more content without having to worry about manual delivery. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can also track your sales and earnings in real-time, which helps you make informed business decisions.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're looking for a hassle-free payment experience without any commission fees or account requirements, Web3 Wallet Connect is the clear winner. With its automated delivery capabilities and support for a wide range of cryptocurrencies, Web3 Wallet Connect offers a permanent structural alternative to Stripe and PayPal. Whether you're a seasoned creator or just starting out, Web3 Wallet Connect is the perfect solution for selling presets and getting paid.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

Creators researching PayPal alternatives often discover that the real problem is not finding a single substitute — it is rebuilding the entire payment and delivery stack on infrastructure that does not inherit conventional payment system restrictions. The Core Shop Engine at $49.99 handles the backend piece: payment verification, automated delivery, and receipt generation. Web3 Wallet Connect at $19.99 handles the buyer-facing checkout. Together, they replace what Gumroad or Payhip was doing, but without any platform that can restrict your access. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes both components plus the Admin Dashboard and deployment guide. Visit the shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see the complete component breakdown.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
